summary: All four requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-4) appear to be substantially implemented. REQ-1 dynamic divisor logic is present in CombinedPercentageView.tsx and percent.ts. REQ-2 nine-scale grading with correct boundaries is implemented in NineScaleGradesView.tsx and gradeCalculation.ts. REQ-3 subject analysis with filters and all four statistics is implemented in SubjectAnalysisView.tsx and subjectAnalysis.ts. REQ-4 certificate generation with the correct formula and grade/term filters is implemented in CertificateView.tsx. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features are detected beyond some extra tier classification features.

hallucinated_features.description: Certificate tier classification (platinum/gold/silver/bronze) with corresponding tier badge colors and certificate images
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires displaying the certificate percentage, grade level, and term. The tier classification system and associated imagery were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Board exam flag detection (isBoardExam = t >= 8) on certificates
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any board exam distinction or special handling for high term numbers on certificates.
